chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 355 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing on Misc. No.1420/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 24-03-2025 None present. This fiscal petition is pending since 2023 without any progress. Petitioner is unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
